metadata.description: fable-to-opus — an adapt-first playbook that helps any Claude model pick up Fable's effective work habits, by auditing your own harness instead of force-injecting rules

plugins.name: fable-to-opus
plugins.description: Adapt-first, not blind-install. Six portable work-method patterns distilled from a short, intensive Fable-5 production run measured against the author's established Opus workflow — directional field notes from one practitioner, not a benchmark. Ships a skill that audits YOUR CLAUDE.md / skills / harness and proposes where each pattern belongs. Honest about what does NOT transfer (most tool-count differences were role/phase confounds, not model superiority).
